metadata.work_item_resume_at: 2.6 D2-completion (6-caller closure of LiveVikunjaClient zero-arg invocations) -- FIRST substantive action, then 2.6 D1 (extended grep verification net), then 2.7, 2.7.v2, 2.8, 2.9 (single Stage-2 commit), 2.10 (append-only STATUS)
metadata.last_ea_commit: f863a22 (EA-5 v5 mid-stage handoff XML, docs-only, 333 insertions)
metadata.last_la_commit: 9277d61 (LA's commit of GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST.xml -- instance 5→6 handoff, docs-only)
metadata.resume_at_action: D2-completion 6-caller closure (~6 lines changed across 6 files; BEFORE: `LiveVikunjaClient()` → AFTER: `LiveVikunjaClient(base_url=cfg["vikunja"]["base_url"])`)
metadata.nature_of_this_file: Bootstrap pointer prepared by Guide instance 6 for the Lead Architect (LA) to attach when spawning a fresh EA chat for instance 6. This file does NOT introduce new procedural instructions -- it points at the locked Stage 2 XML, EA-5's v5 mid-stage handoff (the authoritative work plan), and the Guide-#6 v5 verification + inter-deliverable review + EA-5 init pointer + 9 Guide-#5 disposition files + ack chain-of-custody source files that contain the binding acknowledgments. All actual procedural authority lives in those source files. This pointer additionally documents: (a) FOUR v5 documentation corrections (C1-C4) identified in Guide-#6's v5 verification review at docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_WITH_COUNT_DELTA_CORRECTION.xml. C1 (the +1 M misattribution from GUIDE_PROMPT.xml to fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py) is the most important: it affects EA-6's V0c verification expectations. (b) FIVE v4 documentation corrections (D1-D5) carried forward from the EA-5 init pointer (originally Guide-#5's v4 quality review). The corrections are still binding for EA-6's iteration-1 gate restatement. The v5 XML on disk + Guide-#6 v5 verification file are preserved unmodified for audit; C1-C4 corrections live in this init pointer + the Guide-#6 v5 verification file as forward-correction anchors. EA-6's iteration-1 comprehension gate becomes the authoritative forward statement of the corrected ack chain + count attribution.

ea_initiation.identity: You are Stage 2 Executor Agent (EA) instance 6, the successor to EA instance 5 at the D2/D3/D4 → D1 inter-deliverable boundary of Item 2.6. Stage 2 is HIGH risk. The comprehension-gate block at the top of 03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml is mandatory: present a structured comprehension summary AND restate every binding acknowledgment verbatim, then STOP and WAIT for Guide instance 6 review before any edits, branches, or commands. The LA's "mature not minimal" mandate (p3 + p16 in the GUIDE_HANDOFF_LATEST la_profile) applies throughout: thoroughness wins over speed.

context_summary_what_just_happened.what_ea_5_did:
EA-5 closed structural deliverables D2 (PARTIAL), D3 (CLEAN), D4 (DIVERGE-APPROVED) of Item 2.6, then emitted v5 mid-stage handoff at the clean inter-deliverable breakpoint. Specifically:
D4 (observation o1 routing decision -- DIVERGE-APPROVED): EA-5 chose to KEEP all 8 _require_project_id call sites at handler entry in tools/vikunja_mcp/server.py. This DIVERGES from Guide-#6's chokepoint-only (B) recommendation. EA-5's 4-point rationale (now in single 44-line decision block at server.py lines 13-57): (1) handler call sites ARE the function-level chokepoint integration, not redundancy; (2) VikunjaClient class is a stub with no HTTP delegation, so server.py never traverses class methods; (3) class-routing would be a multi-deliverable refactor outside Item 2.6 D4 scope; (4) test coverage doesn't change either way. Guide-#6 inter-deliverable review APPROVED the divergence and acknowledged the Guide-side reasoning flaw (chokepoint-only B was based on misread of stub state). Decision retention is forward-applicable until VikunjaClient class HTTP delegation is wired in Stage 5+ cleanup.
D4 dup cleanup (Guide-#6 correction-1): EA-5 deleted lines 58-103 of server.py (verbatim duplicate of the 13-57 block). Single 44-line decision block remains at lines 13-57; module imports at line 60+. AST parse OK; pytest 282 holds.
D3 (dashboard_maintainer.py:113 closure): EA-5 added a NEW `update_task` public method to LiveVikunjaClient (legacy fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py lines 105-115) and rewrote dashboard_maintainer.py:113 to call `live.update_task(task_id, description=body, priority=5)` instead of `live._request("POST", ...)`. Zero remaining (live|client)._request hits in production code per grep verification.
D2 (g5-4 legacy fold-vs-shim -- PARTIAL/INCOMPLETE): EA-5 made config_loader.load_config() CONDITIONAL in legacy fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py.__init__ (lines 27-42) by adding a `base_url: str | None = None` parameter. When base_url is None, the conditional fallback invokes load_config zero-arg.
HOWEVER, EA-5 did NOT update the 6 zero-arg production callers (credential_rotation_reminder, welcome_back_digest, daily_digest, weekly_summary, dashboard_maintainer:93, gate_stale_cleaner.run_live) to pass base_url. The 6 callers still construct LiveVikunjaClient() zero-arg, still trigger the conditional fallback, still invoke load_config zero-arg, still walk cwd. Per Stage-4 cutover from devplatform cwd, this resolves to devplatform overlay (NOT BlarAI overlay) -- the exact w15 hazard ack g5-4 explicitly flagged. Per ack g5-4 verbatim text, this triggers the explicit escalation rule. Guide-#6's inter-deliverable review IS that escalation. EA-6 closes via 6-caller update as FIRST substantive action.
Item 2.6 D1 (extended grep verification net): NOT YET STARTED. Mechanical work (~30-60 min) appropriate for EA-6 second substantive action.
v5 emission (per Guide-#6 emission_protocol): EA-5 ran the 5-step protocol from Guide-#6 inter-deliverable review: (1) Deleted server.py duplicate block (Guide-#6 correction-1). (2) Ran pytest tools/ -- 282 passed (zero regression). (3) Drafted EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v5.xml (333 lines) per v1/v2/v3/v4 schema with explicit D2 incompleteness encoded across 5 separate blocks. (4) Committed at f863a22 -- ONE file in diff (the v5 XML). (5) Reported v5 commit hash to LA + cited Guide-#6 review file path. All 4 g6-ea5 acknowledgments (n1 dup cleanup, n2 D2 incompleteness encoding, n3 single docs-only commit, n4 D4 decision retention) SATISFIED on disk. EA-5 retired.
context_summary_what_just_happened.what_guide_6_did_post_v5:
Guide instance 6 performed independent disk verification of EA-5's v5 emission and produced verification file: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_WITH_COUNT_DELTA_CORRECTION.xml
Verdict: V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_AND_APPROVED with 4 documentation corrections (C1-C4) flagged for forward-correction in this EA-6 init pointer:
C1 (+1 M delta misattribution -- LOW severity but most consequential for EA-6): BOTH Guide-#6's inter-deliverable review file AND EA-5's v5 XML §count_delta_vs_guide_6_prediction misattribute the +1 M working-tree delta to docs/platform_separation/GUIDE_PROMPT.xml. Independent disk verification confirms GUIDE_PROMPT.xml has been M throughout the entire chain (v3 → v4 → 9277d61 → v5) and is NOT a delta. The actual +1 M is on tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py which became M for the first time when EA-5 added the conditional load_config (D2 PARTIAL) + new update_task method (D3 enabler). Root cause: Guide-#6's inter-deliverable review claimed "the 4 files EA-5 edited (server.py, legacy _vikunja_client.py, dashboard_maintainer.py...) all already appear as M from prior 2.4 work" -- but EA-4 explicitly deferred the legacy file to 2.6 per g5-4, so it remained matching HEAD. EA-5 inherited Guide-#6's misframing. Both files are immutable per no-amend doctrine; Guide-#6 v5 verification file is the audit anchor for the correct attribution.
C2 (v4 commit hash placeholder -- LOW): v5 XML lines 58-64 git_log_oneline_5 block uses "(predecessor of 9277d61)" instead of the actual hash d0c6df1.
C3 (v4 commit message paraphrased -- LOW): v5 XML line 60 paraphrases v4 commit message; verbatim is "Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v4 -- item 2.4 closed (all 13) + f1 fix + items 2.5 + 2.5.v2 complete (all uncommitted), resume at 2.6".
C4 (head_at_handoff_after_this_commit descriptive -- LOW): v5 XML metadata line 10 uses "(this commit -- one parent ahead of 9277d61)" instead of the actual v5 hash f863a22. Unavoidable since v5 XML was authored before its own commit landed.
No required corrections from Guide-#6; v5 emission was substantively clean. The 4 corrections are documentation-accuracy issues forward-corrected here so EA-6's iteration-1 gate can restate the corrected attribution + values.
context_summary_what_just_happened.where_you_pick_up: Resume Item 2.6 at D2-completion (6-caller closure). Then proceed through D1 (extended grep verification net), 2.7 (pytest gate ≥282 + V1-V7), 2.7.v2 (V matrix V4-V7 NEW tests authoring -- AST-driven probe pattern from scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 is precedent), 2.8 ($BLARAI_PID==3 hard gate per g4-5 with stop-and-report on drift), 2.9 (SINGLE Stage-2 commit folding ALL work; pyproject.toml MUST be in commit), and 2.10 (append-only STATUS append per g5-10 + corollary + v5 documentation correction footnote per C1-C4).

v5_documentation_corrections_required.intro: EA-5's v5 mid-stage handoff XML at docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v5.xml is preserved on disk for audit. The four corrections below (C1-C4) are forward-corrected in this init pointer; EA-6 MUST restate the corrections verbatim in iteration-1 comprehension gate so the audit chain forward is clean. Source citation: Guide-#6 v5 verification file at docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_WITH_COUNT_DELTA_CORRECTION.xml.

correction.ea_5_v5_xml_claim: v5 XML §ground_truth_at_handoff §count_delta_vs_guide_6_prediction (lines 55-57): "Delta: +1 M on docs/platform_separation/GUIDE_PROMPT.xml (a docs-governance file owned by the LA; modified between Guide-#6's audit timestamp and v5 emission, OR Guide-#6's count omitted it because the file is considered governance not refactor). EA-5 has NOT touched GUIDE_PROMPT.xml in this session; the M state is inherited from prior cycles."
correction.correct_attribution:
GUIDE_PROMPT.xml has been M throughout the entire v3 → v4 → 9277d61 → v5 chain -- verified by reading the v4 git_status_porcelain block (which lists GUIDE_PROMPT.xml as M at v4 emission) and the current `git status --porcelain` output (which still lists it as M). It is NOT a delta vs v4.
The actual +1 M delta is on tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py. This file was NOT M at v4 emission (EA-4 explicitly deferred it to 2.6 per g5-4, file 12 disposition NO CHANGE in 2.4 closure -- verified in v4 work_completed_this_session §file_path="tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py" disposition="DEFER_to_item_2.6_g5_4"). EA-5's session edits (D2 conditional load_config + D3 update_task method) made it M for the first time. Going from 21 M at v4 to 22 M at v5.
Total post-v5 working-tree count: 22 M + 2 D + 9 ?? = 33 entries.
correction.ea_6_action: EA-6's V0c verification expects 33 entries with the correct +1 attribution to tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py. EA-6's iteration-1 comprehension gate MUST restate this correction (verbatim from this block) and explicitly state which file is the actual delta. EA-6 will discover the legacy file's M state when reading v5 XML §work_completed_this_session §2.6_D2_PARTIAL + §2.6_D3 (both correctly identify the legacy file as edited). This C1 correction simply ensures the count_delta block restating is accurate.

correction.ea_5_v5_xml_claim: v5 XML lines 58-64 git_log_oneline_5 block uses "(predecessor of 9277d61)" instead of the actual hash.
correction.ea_6_action: EA-6 iteration-1 gate uses d0c6df1 when referencing the v4 commit.

correction.ea_5_v5_xml_claim: v5 XML line 60 paraphrases v4 commit message as "items 2.1+2.2+2.3+2.4 + f1 + 2.5 + 2.5.v2 complete (uncommitted), resume at 2.6".
correction.correct_value: Verbatim from `git log --oneline d0c6df1`: "d0c6df1 docs(platform_separation): Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v4 -- item 2.4 closed (all 13) + f1 fix + items 2.5 + 2.5.v2 complete (all uncommitted), resume at 2.6"
correction.ea_6_action: EA-6 uses the verbatim form when referencing v4 commit message in any artifact.

correction.ea_5_v5_xml_claim: v5 XML metadata line 10 says "(this commit -- one parent ahead of 9277d61; the v5 handoff XML is the only file in the diff)".
correction.correct_value: v5 commit hash: f863a22 (after the v5 commit landed; cannot be self-referential within the v5 XML itself).
correction.ea_6_action: EA-6 references v5 commit as f863a22 in iteration-1 gate, V0b output, and any 2.10 STATUS append narrative.

v5_documentation_corrections_required.documented_in_2_10_status_append: Per init pointer corollary, EA-6 will include in the 2.10 STATUS.md append-only entry the verbatim footnote: "v5 mid-stage handoff XML at f863a22 contained 4 minor documentation defects (C1 +1 M attribution misnamed as GUIDE_PROMPT.xml; actual is fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py; C2 v4 hash placeholder; C3 v4 commit message paraphrased; C4 head_at_handoff_after_this_commit descriptive). Forward-corrected in EA-6 iteration-1 gate via Guide-#6 init pointer at docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_6_STAGE2_RESUME_AT_ITEM_2.6_D2_COMPLETION.xml and Guide-#6 v5 verification file at docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_WITH_COUNT_DELTA_CORRECTION.xml." This is in addition to the v4 documentation correction footnote per D2 of v4 quality review (carried forward from EA-5 init pointer; still required).

v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.source: EA-5 init pointer + Guide-#5 v4 quality review
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.intro: D1-D5 corrections from Guide-#5's v4 quality review remain binding. EA-6 MUST restate them verbatim in iteration-1 gate alongside C1-C4 above. Source: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.5-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_V4_QUALITY_REVIEW_DEFECTS_FOUND.xml and EA-5 init pointer §v4_documentation_corrections_required.
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.D1: g5-N mapping correction (g5-7=dup tests cleanup; g5-8=env-fallback in 6 PS1; g5-9=$McpConfigPath derivation in 2 scripts; g5-10=A11 anomaly + g5-7/8/9/10 dispositions in 2.10 STATUS append). v4 XML's incorrect labels rejected; correct mapping flowed forward through EA-5 iter-1 gate.
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.D2: 33-ack count correction (v4's "27_total" rejected; correct count 33 = 9 critical_carryovers + 3 g3 + 4 i1 + 7 g4 + 4 g5-1..4 + 2 g5-5/6 + 4 g5-7..10; f1 = g5-5 not separate). Will be restated in EA-6 iter-1 gate as audit history.
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.D3: cleaner.py was substantive ~44 LOC g5-3 Option (b) project-aware fallback (3-branch logic), NOT trivial chokepoint alignment. Cite Guide-#5 disposition file 4 verdict="PASS_OPTION_B_THOROUGH".
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.D4: f1 fix was rejection-condition extension + 2 NET-ADD tests; signature unchanged. NOT signature/routing.
v4_documentation_corrections_carried_for.D5: canonical_param_pattern phantom [Parameter(Mandatory=$false)] decorator does not exist on disk; cosmetic only.

ack_status_at_v5_emission.intro: For EA-6's iteration-1 comprehension gate, here is the status of each binding ack at v5 emission. The 33 acks from v4 era (D2 source citations in EA-5 init pointer §ack_status_at_v4_emission) carry forward; some have transitioned status as work landed. Plus 4 g6-ea5 acks introduced in Guide-#6 inter-deliverable review (now SATISFIED at v5 emission). Plus 4 NEW g6-ea6 acks introduced in this init pointer (FORWARD-ACTIVE for EA-6).

preserved_from_v4.ack: single Stage-2 commit at item 2.9 (intermediate work uncommitted)
fleet stays paused throughout Stage 2; NEVER state.resume_fleet
no merge to main during Stage 2
stash@{0} (sdo 20260424_013002) is NOT to be popped or applied
no edits to CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, copilot-instructions.md, or any A1-A10 governance doc
all Vikunja access flows through tools/_vikunja_client.py; bool rejection
_project_context.resolve() is the single source for ProjectContext
V8 defaults preservation
STATUS.md updates at 2.10 are APPEND-ONLY
single Stage-2 commit only
V1-V7 + V8 verification block before closing handoff
Item 2.10 STATUS.md edit is append-only
V0 pickup verification re-executed at start of every successor session
all binding acks remain in force through Stage 4 cutover (dedup rule)
V1-V7 closure + per-item V8 in closing handoff
if context exhausts before 2.9, emit v(N+1) mid-stage handoff XML; docs-only commit; no partial-commit refactor
corrections incorporated; carries as discipline if Guide-#6 surfaces corrections at iter-1
canonical PS1 signature_pattern_ps1; alias direction preserved
explicit enumeration discipline (no "...other entrypoints" hand-waves)
vikunja_mcp/server.py §D.1 hardening complete (file 13)
$BLARAI_PID drift = STOP and report; NO silent regex/yaml adaptation
descriptive risk labels; compound labels with reference prefixes acceptable
begin authorization received after iter-2 APPROVED
LA-side housekeeping V0c expectations accounted for
file 12 path: legacy fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py vs new tools/_vikunja_client.py
cleaner.py:180 fallback Option (b) project-aware fallback applied (substantive ~44 LOC per D3 correction)

tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py:line-40 load_config callsite -- 6 zero-arg callers MUST be updated to pass base_url=cfg["vikunja"]["base_url"]; transitions to SATISFIED only after all 6 callers updated AND pytest 282 holds AND grep `LiveVikunjaClient\(\s*\)` returns 0 hits in production code. THIS IS EA-6's FIRST SUBSTANTIVE ACTION.
f1 disposition Option (a) -- _require_project_id rejection condition extended; 2 NET-ADD tests; pytest 282 confirmed
path-confusion correction acknowledged (g5-4 ≠ f1; different files, different scope)
test_vikunja_client_scope.py duplicate test definitions deleted; pytest 282 holds
env-fallback default applied in all 6 modified PS1 scripts; verified by AST probe axis 2 PASS
$McpConfigPath = Join-Path $RepoRoot '.mcp.json' in 2 scripts; verified by probe axis 4 PASS

A11 alias-vs-rename anomaly + g5-7/8/9 dispositions + f1 disposition + encoding regression footnote + 2.5.v2 closure pointer + v4 doc correction footnote (per D2) + v5 doc correction footnote (per C1-C4) ALL required in 2.10 STATUS append-only entry

new_g6_ea5_introduced_in_inter_deliverab.ack: D4 dup cleanup -- server.py lines 58-103 deleted; AST parse OK; pytest 282 holds.
D2 incompleteness encoded in v5 XML -- 5-block encoding across work_completed + work_remaining + critical_carryovers + V0 verification.
Single docs-only commit for v5 -- f863a22, 1 file in diff (333 insertions).
D4 decision retention; forward-applicable until VikunjaClient class HTTP delegation lands.

new_g6_ea6_introduced_in_this_init_point.ack: D2-completion 6-caller closure as FIRST substantive action after V0 + iter-1 gate. Update each of 6 zero-arg LiveVikunjaClient() callers to pass base_url=cfg["vikunja"]["base_url"]. The 6 callers (verbatim list, full paths): (1) tools/fleet_observability/credential_rotation_reminder.py; (2) tools/fleet_observability/welcome_back_digest.py; (3) tools/fleet_observability/daily_digest.py; (4) tools/fleet_observability/weekly_summary.py; (5) tools/fleet_observability/dashboard_maintainer.py (line ~93); (6) tools/gate_stale_cleaner/run_live.py. BEFORE/AFTER pattern: BEFORE: `live = LiveVikunjaClient()` AFTER: `live = LiveVikunjaClient(base_url=cfg["vikunja"]["base_url"])`. Each caller already has `cfg` resolved via prior ctx-aware load_config call. Total ~6 lines changed. Pytest sanity check after edits: `pytest tools/ --tb=short -q`; expect 282 passed. Grep verification: `grep -rn 'LiveVikunjaClient\(\s*\)' tools/` returns 0 hits in production code. Ack g5-4 transitions from FORWARD-ACTIVE to SATISFIED.

+1 M working-tree delta correct attribution. v5 XML §count_delta_vs_guide_6_prediction misattributes the +1 to GUIDE_PROMPT.xml; actual is tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py (per Guide-#6 v5 verification correction C1). EA-6 iteration-1 gate restates the corrected attribution; V0c verification observes 33 entries (22 M + 2 D + 9 ??) with the +1 M correctly identified as fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py.

v5 XML minor doc defects (C2 v4 hash placeholder; C3 v4 commit message paraphrase; C4 v5 head_at_handoff_after_this_commit descriptive) acknowledged in 2.10 STATUS.md append-only footnote per documented_in_2_10_status_append block above.

If EA-6 budget tightens at any clean breakpoint before Item 2.9 (e.g., D2-completion close, D1 close, 2.7 close, 2.7.v2 close), emit v6 mid-stage handoff XML following v1/v2/v3/v4/v5 schema (docs-only commit, one file in diff). NO partial-commit refactor work. NO emergency single-commit attempts.

ack_status_at_v5_emission.total:
33 (v4-era preserved) + 4 (g6-ea5 SATISFIED audit) + 4 (g6-ea6 FORWARD-ACTIVE) = 41 binding acks.
Of these: - 26 FORWARD-ACTIVE (9 critical_carryovers n=1..9; 3 g3; 4 i1; 4 g4 [g4-2,3,5,6]; 1 g5-4 [CRITICAL FIRST-ACTION]; 1 g5-10 [FORWARD-at-2.10]; 4 g6-ea6) -- require ongoing enforcement through Stage 4 cutover or specific item - 15 SATISFIED (3 g4 [g4-1,4,7]; 3 g5-1..g5-3; 2 g5-5/g5-6; 3 g5-7..g5-9; 4 g6-ea5) -- audit history; restated verbatim in iter-1 gate but no enforcement obligation
EA-6 iteration-1 comprehension gate restates ALL 41 verbatim with status flags + source_file attributes per ack group. Verbatim restatement source files (cite each in EA-6 iter-1 gate): - 9 critical_carryovers + 3 g3 + 4 i1: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-RESPONSE-EA_COMPREHENSION_GATE_ITERATION_2_STAGE2.xml - 7 g4-N: same file + docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_TO_EA_INITIALIZATION_03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml - 4 g5-1..g5-4: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_VERIFICATION_OF_EA_2.4_PARTIAL.xml - 2 g5-5/g5-6: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_F1_DISPOSITION_OPTION_A.xml - 4 g5-7..g5-10: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_VERIFICATION_OF_EA_4_F1_AND_2.5_WITH_ADJUSTMENTS.xml - 4 g6-ea5: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_INTER_DELIVERABLE_REVIEW_EA_5_D2_INCOMPLETE_V5_AUTHORIZED.xml §required_acknowledgments - 4 g6-ea6: this init pointer §ack_status_at_v5_emission §new_g6_ea6_introduced_in_this_init_pointer

required_reading_order.doc: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_6_STAGE2_RESUME_AT_ITEM_2.6_D2_COMPLETION.xml You are reading this. Bootstrap pointer prepared by Guide instance 6. The actual procedural authority lives in docs 2-22 below. Use the v5_documentation_corrections_required block in this file as the AUTHORITATIVE C1-C4 corrections + the v4_documentation_corrections_carried_forward block for D1-D5 + the ack_status_at_v5_emission table for the 41-ack chain.

docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v5.xml EA-5's mid-stage handoff (commit f863a22, 333 insertions, sole file in diff). Authoritative work plan: ground truth at handoff (with C1 misattribution noted), work_completed_inherited (carries from v1/v2/v3/v4), work_completed_this_session (D2-PARTIAL + D3 + D4 + D4-dup-cleanup), work_remaining (D2-completion FIRST + D1 + 2.7 + 2.7.v2 + 2.8 + 2.9 + 2.10), V0a-V0l pickup verification block, successor_immediate_next_actions (9 steps). THIS IS YOUR PRIMARY WORK PLAN -- but be aware of the v5 documentation defects C1-C4 corrected in this init pointer's <v5_documentation_corrections_required> block.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_WITH_COUNT_DELTA_CORRECTION.xml Guide-#6's verification of EA-5's v5 emission. Verdict: V5_EMISSION_VERIFIED_AND_APPROVED with 4 documentation corrections (C1-C4) flagged for forward-correction. Read this BEFORE the v5 handoff XML so you internalize the corrections. The corrections in <v5_documentation_corrections_required> mirror this disposition; the source file is the audit anchor.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_6_INTER_DELIVERABLE_REVIEW_EA_5_D2_INCOMPLETE_V5_AUTHORIZED.xml Guide-#6's inter-deliverable review of EA-5's D2/D3/D4 work + v5 handoff authorization. Contains: per-deliverable verdict, D3 CLEAN verification, D4 DIVERGE-APPROVED rationale (with Guide-side reasoning correction acknowledged), D4 dup cleanup correction-1, D2 INCOMPLETE per ack g5-4 with closure path detail, v5 emission 5-step protocol, 4 g6-ea5 acknowledgments (now SATISFIED at v5). Pattern reference for the disciplined approach EA-6 inherits.

docs/platform_separation/03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml THE locked Stage 2 stage prompt. Read in full: comprehension_gate block (mandatory), vikunja_access_protocol, v2_updates (2.4.v2, 2.5.v2, 2.7.v2), all work_items (especially 2.6 with grep_patterns + triage_rule), rollback, verification_commands_for_lead_architect, exit_criteria. This file is the authoritative scope of Stage 2.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.6-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_5_STAGE2_RESUME_AT_ITEM_2.6.xml Guide-#6's EA-5 init pointer. Structural template for THIS init pointer. Contains v4_documentation_corrections_required (D1-D5 source) + ack_status_at_v4_emission table (33-ack chain with status flags at v4). EA-6 reads to understand the ack chain forward from v4 → v5. Do NOT re-execute its required_first_actions (those were for EA-5).

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.5-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_V4_QUALITY_REVIEW_DEFECTS_FOUND.xml Guide-#5's quality review of v4. Defines D1-D5 corrections (g5-N mapping; 33-ack count; cleaner.py characterization; f1 characterization; phantom decorator). Source for the v4_documentation_corrections_carried_forward block in this init pointer.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_2.5.v2_APPROVED_V4_HANDOFF_AUTHORIZED.xml Guide-#5's 2.5.v2 verification + v4 handoff authorization. Probe methodology rated PASS_HIGH_QUALITY. Pattern reference for 2.7.v2 V matrix V4-V7 NEW tests authoring (V5 AST-driven probe).

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_F1_AND_2.5_CORRECTIONS_APPROVED.xml Guide-#5's re-verification of EA-4's 3 corrections. Pattern reference for catching EA-report omissions via independent disk verification.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_VERIFICATION_OF_EA_4_F1_AND_2.5_WITH_ADJUSTMENTS.xml CANONICAL SOURCE for the corrected g5-7/8/9/10 mapping (per D1 of v4 quality review). EA-6 reads required_acknowledgments_for_ea_4_to_emit block to get verbatim text of the four g5-7/8/9/10 acks for iteration-1 gate restatement.
docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_F1_DISPOSITION_OPTION_A.xml Guide-#5's f1 disposition: Option (a) authorized. Source for g5-5 + g5-6 binding acks.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_VERIFICATION_OF_EA_4_2.4_COMPLETE.xml Guide-#5's verification of EA-4's full Item 2.4 closure. Cite check id="g5_3_cleaner_closed" verdict="PASS_OPTION_B_THOROUGH" for D3 correction reference.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_ITERATION_1_APPROVED_EA_4.xml Guide-#5's iter-1 APPROVAL of EA-4's comprehension gate. Pattern reference + 3 standing reminders (r1, r2, r3).

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_5_VERIFICATION_OF_EA_2.4_PARTIAL.xml Source for g5-1/g5-2/g5-3/g5-4 acks per D2 ack chain. The g5-4 source is critical -- EA-6 reads to internalize the verbatim w15 escalation rule that drives D2-completion.
docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_4_STAGE2_RESUME_AT_FILE_7.xml EA-4 init pointer. Read for context only; do NOT re-execute its required_first_actions.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-RESPONSE-EA_COMPREHENSION_GATE_ITERATION_2_STAGE2.xml EA-3's iteration-2 comprehension gate. SOURCE for first 23 of the 41 binding acks (9 critical_carryovers + 3 g3 + 4 i1 + 7 g4) per the 41-ack chain in <ack_status_at_v5_emission>.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_ITERATION_2_APPROVED_03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml Guide instance 4's iteration-2 APPROVAL with answer_to_ea_open_question on critical_notify.ps1 + escalation_notify.ps1 (default = no-action with Appendix A.1 citation; runtime-path discovery = STOP and report). Inspection rule for any expanded- audit-scope PS1 surfacing during D1 grep.
docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.4-GUIDE_RESPONSE_TO_EA_INITIALIZATION_03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml Guide instance 4's iteration-1 review with 8 corrections. Pattern reference.

docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/2.5-EA_ACKNOWLEDGMENTS_PROCEED_TO_ITEM_2.4.xml EA-3's three small acknowledgments (g4-1/g4-2/g4-3). Inspection-rule discipline for any PS1 the expanded 3-directory audit surfaces beyond canonical 7.

docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md Living state file. EA-6 will append a Stage 2 closure entry at item 2.10 (append-only) including A11 anomaly + g5-7/8/9/10 + f1 + 2.5.v2 evidence + v4 doc correction footnote (D2) + v5 doc correction footnote (C1-C4 per documented_in_2_10_status_append above).

docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v4.xml EA-4's v4 handoff (commit d0c6df1). Inherited by v5; EA-6 reads for full audit chain. Note v4 documentation defects D1-D5 per Guide-#5 v4 quality review.

docs/platform_separation/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2.xml Original Stage 1→2 handoff. Contains verbatim V1-V7 closure verification block EA-6 runs at item 2.7.v2 + per-item V8 at 2.7. Restates original 9 critical_carryovers (binding acks 1-9 of the 41).
docs/platform_separation/AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW.md Risk register: §0.5 V1-V8, §0.6 R1-R12, §1 C1-C10 (C2 deferred to Stage 6; C4 SATISFIED at file 13; C6 forward to D1 grep at 2.6), §3 P1-P12.

docs/platform_separation/WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md G-1 through G-4 + S-1/S-2/S-3 + Appendix A.1 (critical_notify.ps1 + escalation_notify.ps1 SKIP source). §3 G-1 fix #1 source for g5-9 ($McpConfigPath derivation).

required_first_actions.action: Per .github/copilot-instructions.md §fleet_pause_sop and §Execution_Agent: verify the fleet remains paused via: python -c "import json; print(json.load(open('tools/autonomy_budget/state.json'))['fleet_paused'])" Expected: True. Original last_updated_by="copilot_agent" + last_updated_utc="2026-04-24T20:46:12Z" must be PRESERVED across this session. Do NOT call state.resume_fleet() or pause_fleet() at any point this session (binding acks n=2 + i1-2). Function-name reminder: state.resume_fleet() -- NEVER unpause_fleet() (AttributeError).

Run V0a-V0l pickup verification per v5 XML §successor_pickup_verification: V0a: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD EXPECT: chore/platform-extraction V0b: git log --oneline -3 EXPECT: f863a22 (v5 mid-stage handoff) AT HEAD; 9277d61 (Guide-5→6 handoff) parent; d0c6df1 (v4 mid-stage handoff) grandparent. V0c: git status --porcelain | wc -l EXPECT: 33 entries (22 M + 2 D + 9 ??). **PER GUIDE-#6 CORRECTION C1**: the +1 M delta vs v4 (going from 21 M to 22 M) is on tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py (NOT GUIDE_PROMPT.xml as v5 XML §count_delta_vs_guide_6_prediction misattributes). EA-6 verifies by listing the M files and confirming fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py is present in M list. V0d: stash list EXPECT: stash@{0}: On main: wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002 (DO NOT POP) V0e: state.json EXPECT: fleet_paused=true; reason "platform separation v2 in progress"; last_updated_by="copilot_agent"; last_updated_utc="2026-04-24T20:46:12Z" (preserved values; if differ, SOMEONE called pause/resume; STOP and report) V0f: pytest tools/ --tb=short -q EXPECT: 282 passed (zero regression vs v4/v5 baseline) V0g: head -60 tools/vikunja_mcp/server.py EXPECT: single 44-line decision block at lines 13-57; closing `"""` at line 58; `from __future__ import annotations` at line 60. NO duplicate block (per Guide-#6 correction-1 satisfied at v5 emission). V0h: grep `(live|client)\._request` tools/{fleet_observability,gate_stale_cleaner}/**/*.py EXPECT: 1 hit only (the comment at dashboard_maintainer.py:113 documenting OLD code; D3 CLEAN per v5). V0i: grep `def update_task` tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py EXPECT: 1 hit at line ~105 (the new public method per v5 D3 enabler). V0j: grep `cfg = config_loader.load_config()` tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py EXPECT: 1 hit at line ~40 (inside `if base_url is None:` block; conditional fallback per v5 D2 PARTIAL). V0k: grep `LiveVikunjaClient\(\s*\)` tools/ EXPECT: 6 hits (the 6 zero-arg production callers; D2-completion will reduce this to 0 after EA-6's first substantive action). V0l: count_delta_acknowledged EXPECT: EA-6 explicitly states the +1 M is on tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py (NOT GUIDE_PROMPT.xml as v5 XML misattributes; per Guide-#6 v5 verification correction C1). Report all V0a-V0l outputs in iteration-1 gate. ON ANY V0 FAILURE: STOP. Report which V0 check failed with actual observed value vs expected. Do NOT proceed to substantive work.

Per the mandatory comprehension_gate at the top of 03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml, emit iteration-1 comprehension gate as XML. Structure (mirror EA-3 iter-2 + EA-4 iter-1 + EA-5 iter-1 for consistency):
- meta block (stage_id, stage_xml, ea_instance=6, iteration=1, branch, head=f863a22, predecessor_ea=5)
- pickup_verification_recap (V0a-V0l outputs from action 2)
- v5_documentation_corrections_acknowledged: restate the 4 corrections (C1/C2/C3/C4) from this init pointer's <v5_documentation_corrections_required> block VERBATIM.
- v4_documentation_corrections_acknowledged: restate the 5 corrections (D1/D2/D3/D4/D5) from this init pointer's <v4_documentation_corrections_carried_forward> block (status SATISFIED-AS-AUDIT-HISTORY).
- required_acknowledgments_carryforward_verbatim_41_total: * 33 v4-era acks restated VERBATIM per <ack_status_at_v5_emission> §preserved_from_v4 (status flags updated for v5 emission) * 4 g6-ea5 acks restated as SATISFIED-AS-AUDIT-HISTORY * 4 g6-ea6 acks restated as FORWARD-ACTIVE (g6-ea6_n1 priority CRITICAL-FIRST-ACTION) Total 41 binding acks. Each with status flag + source_file attribute citing chain-of-custody source per <ack_status_at_v5_emission> §total.
- comprehension_summary: part_a_objective: complete Stage 2 Item 2.6 D2-completion (FIRST) → D1 → 2.7 → 2.7.v2 → 2.8 ($BLARAI_PID==3 hard gate) → 2.9 (single Stage-2 commit; pyproject.toml MUST) → 2.10 (append-only STATUS with all required inclusions per g5-10 + corollary + v4 D2 footnote + v5 C1-C4 footnote) part_b_work_plan: enumerate D2-completion (FIRST -- 6-caller closure with BEFORE/AFTER pattern verbatim from g6-ea6_n1), D1 (12-pattern grep verification net), 2.7, 2.7.v2, 2.8, 2.9, 2.10. The D4 decision (DIVERGE-APPROVED) and D3 (CLEAN) are inherited from v5; no rebar opening. part_d_verification_strategy: V0a-V0l pickup verification COMPLETE; per-deliverable verification at D2-completion (pytest re-run after edits + grep zero-hits verification); D1 grep tabulation; V1-V7 closure at 2.7; V matrix V4-V7 NEW at 2.7.v2; $BLARAI_PID==3 hard gate at 2.8. part_e_risks: descriptive labels per g4-6 + g6_compound_label_pattern. Most active for EA-6: g5-4-d2-completion-CRITICAL-FIRST-ACTION; w12-multi-file-disk-verification; w13-single-commit-discipline; C6-extended-grep-coverage; C2-stage-6-deferral; i1-4-g6_ea6_n4-mid-stage-handoff; w3/g4-5-blarai-pid-2.8; dn18-path-confusion; dn19-defect-vs-scope-expansion; c1-count-delta-correct-attribution. part_f_rollback_acknowledgment: verbatim "If post-item-2.9 verification fails (V1-V7 closure or per-item V8), rollback is `git reset --hard HEAD~1` on chore/platform-extraction (level-1 per RECOVERY.md; branch is local, not pushed). Branch is preserved for audit per copilot-instructions preservation_rule. Fleet stays disabled -- no runtime impact from rollback."
- stop_discipline: STOPPING. Awaiting Guide instance 6 review. No D2-completion edits, branch creation, or mutation commands until explicit PROCEED authorization.
Then STOP. Do not proceed to D2-completion 6-caller closure work until Guide instance 6 reviews and approves iteration-1 gate.

ea_initiation.work_plan_pointer:
The v5 mid-stage handoff is the authoritative work plan, with C1-C4 corrections applied. Execution order:
D2-completion (FIRST -- per g6-ea6_n1 priority CRITICAL): Update each of 6 zero-arg LiveVikunjaClient() callers to pass base_url explicitly. BEFORE: `live = LiveVikunjaClient()` AFTER: `live = LiveVikunjaClient(base_url=cfg["vikunja"]["base_url"])` Files (verbatim, full paths): 1. tools/fleet_observability/credential_rotation_reminder.py 2. tools/fleet_observability/welcome_back_digest.py 3. tools/fleet_observability/daily_digest.py 4. tools/fleet_observability/weekly_summary.py 5. tools/fleet_observability/dashboard_maintainer.py (line ~93) 6. tools/gate_stale_cleaner/run_live.py Each caller already has `cfg` resolved via prior ctx-aware load_config call (e.g., dashboard_maintainer.py:85-92). Total ~6 lines changed. Verification: pytest tools/ --tb=short -q → expect 282 passed (no V matrix tests target this code path; baseline holds). Grep verification: `grep -rn 'LiveVikunjaClient\(\s*\)' tools/` returns 0 hits in production code. ack g5-4 transitions from FORWARD-ACTIVE to SATISFIED.
D1 (extended grep verification net -- 12 patterns per Master Plan §6.2 + AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW C6): After D2-completion lands. Grep across tools/ for chokepoint-violation patterns: - https?://localhost:3456 ; requests\.(get|post|put|patch|delete) ; urllib\. / urllib3\. / aiohttp\. / httpx\. ; api/v1/ / api/v2/ ; Authorization.*Bearer ; X-Api-Token ; VIKUNJA_API_TOKEN ; .vikunja.yaml ; LiveVikunjaClient ; vikunja_mcp\.client ; tools/_vikunja_client (sanity check). ALL hits MUST be inside tools/_vikunja_client.VikunjaClient or its tests OR LegacyVikunjaClient (inside the same module). Triage every hit; do not pre-filter. Document findings + dispositions in EA-6 working notes; surface non-zero findings to LA + Guide-#6 if outside D1 scope (NO silent expansion).
Item 2.7 (pytest gate): pytest tools/ --tb=short -q (expect ≥282 passed); V1-V7 closure assertions per EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2.xml; per-item V8 (defaults-preservation) on 2.6-touched files.
Item 2.7.v2 (V matrix V4-V7 NEW tests authoring): V4 = CLI flag exposure (parametrized per refactored entrypoint). V5 = PS1 -BlarAIRoot test (pester or pytest-via-subprocess; AST-driven probe at scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 is precedent reference). V6 = MCP server project_id rejection (mock-based). V7 = cross-project byte-identity (run with two project overlays and diff outputs).
Item 2.8 ($BLARAI_PID hard gate per g4-5): python -c "from tools import _project_context; ctx = _project_context.resolve(); assert ctx.vikunja_project_id == 3, f'expected 3, got {ctx.vikunja_project_id}'; print('OK ctx.vikunja_project_id =', ctx.vikunja_project_id)" ON DRIFT: STOP. Do NOT proceed to commit. Report to LA. NO silent regex/yaml adaptation.
Item 2.9 (SINGLE Stage-2 commit folding ALL uncommitted work): Commit template per v5 §work_remaining §2.9 (lines 201-227). pyproject.toml MUST be in this commit per i1-3.
Item 2.10 (append-only STATUS.md update): Required inclusions per g5-10 + corollary + this init pointer's documented_in_2_10_status_append block. Includes A11 anomaly + g5-7/8/9/10 + f1 + 2.5.v2 evidence pointer + v4 doc correction footnote (D2) + v5 doc correction footnote (C1-C4).

stop_conditions.condition: If V0a-V0l pickup verification surfaces drift beyond 33-entry working tree (with the +1 M correctly attributed to fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py per C1), STOP. Report to LA / Guide-#6 before any work.
If g6-ea6_n1 D2-completion 6-caller update produces test failures or grep doesn't drop to 0 hits in production, STOP. Investigate before proceeding to D1.
If D1 grep surfaces a chokepoint violation requiring substantive scope expansion (e.g., new HTTP client library not in 12 patterns), STOP and report. NO silent chokepoint contract expansion.
If item 2.8 $BLARAI_PID preflight returns empty or any value other than 3, STOP and report to LA per g4-5. NO silent regex/yaml adaptation.
If post-item-2.9 verification fails (V1-V7 closure or per-item V8), STOP. Rollback is `git reset --hard HEAD~1` on chore/platform-extraction.

If context exhaustion threatens at any clean breakpoint before Item 2.9 (D2-completion close, D1 close, 2.7 close, 2.7.v2 close), emit v6 mid-stage handoff XML following v1/v2/v3/v4/v5 schema (docs-only commit). NO partial-commit refactor; NO emergency single-commit attempts (per g6-ea6_n4 + i1-4).
If you discover a v5 documentation defect not listed in C1-C4, STOP and report to Guide-#6. Do NOT silently re-correct beyond the established forward-correction framework.

forbidden.prohibition: Do NOT merge chore/platform-extraction to main during Stage 2. Merge gate is Stage 5.10 with explicit Lead Architect approval per R10.
Do NOT git stash pop / git stash apply / git stash drop on stash@{0}. It is a stale wake_launcher auto-stash, intentionally untouched. Byte-identical timestamp 20260424_013002 must be preserved.
Do NOT edit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, or any A1-A10 governance doc. V8 / Stage 6.1.v2 deferred.

Do NOT call state.resume_fleet(...). Fleet stays paused through Stage 4 cutover. Function-name reminder: resume_fleet, NEVER unpause_fleet (AttributeError). Original last_updated_by="copilot_agent" + last_updated_utc="2026-04-24T20:46:12Z" must be PRESERVED.

Do NOT produce more than one Stage 2 commit. The single commit happens at item 2.9. Mid-stage handoff XMLs (v6+) are docs-only commits, separate from the Stage 2 commit; they are exempt from the single-commit-for-Stage-2 rule.
Do NOT touch any file under docs/platform_separation/ other than (a) STATUS.md append-only at item 2.10, and (b) any v6+ mid-stage handoff XML you yourself emit to ea_outputs/.

Do NOT delete or "clean up" the v1, v2, v3, v4, v5 mid-stage handoff XMLs, the 9 Guide-#5 disposition files, the 3 Guide-#6 disposition files (inter-deliverable review + v5 verification + this init pointer), the iteration-history Guide reviews, the EA iteration gates, the post-approval acknowledgments file, or any prior handoff/initialization pointer. All stay on disk for audit history.
Do NOT add tools/autonomy_budget/projects/__init__.py. The projects/ dir is a YAML data root, not a Python package.

Do NOT silently expand scope. Default disposition for any audit-surfaced PS1 (e.g., critical_notify, escalation_notify) is no-action with Appendix A.1 citation. Scope expansion requires explicit LA approval after a discovered runtime BlarAI path. In-scope DEFECT closure (like g5-4 D2-completion) is LA-authorized via Guide disposition (this init pointer); distinct from additive scope expansion.

Do NOT trust v5 XML's count_delta_vs_guide_6_prediction block as authoritative for the +1 M attribution. Per Guide-#6 correction C1, the +1 M is on tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py, NOT GUIDE_PROMPT.xml. EA-6's V0c verification + iteration-1 gate restate the correct attribution.
Do NOT relabel binding acks with new IDs or reuse SATISFIED ack labels for new work. The 41-ack chain is fixed; only NEW g6-ea6+ acks may be introduced (via Guide-#6+ disposition).
Do NOT confuse the legacy tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py with the new chokepoint tools/_vikunja_client.py. Always cite full paths when discussing either file (per dn18 + g5-6).
Do NOT defer the D2-completion 6-caller closure to a different stage. It is EA-6's FIRST substantive action and must complete BEFORE D1 (per g6-ea6_n1 priority CRITICAL).

Do NOT skip independent disk verification before each substantive edit. The LA's "mature not minimal" mandate (p3 + p16) + dn14 + dn20 require disk verification on every EA report and pre-edit. Re-read the relevant files (tools/fleet_observability/_vikunja_client.py __init__ + dashboard_maintainer.py:85-93 + the 5 other zero-arg callers) end-to-end before applying the BEFORE/AFTER pattern.

Do NOT re-open D4 (DIVERGE-APPROVED) or D3 (CLEAN) decisions. Both are retained from v5; EA-6's work focuses on D2-completion + D1 + 2.7-2.10. Per g6-ea5_n4: D4 decision retention is forward-applicable until VikunjaClient class HTTP delegation lands in Stage 5+.

ea_initiation.closing_handoff_to_la_at_stage_2_close: On Stage 2 completion (item 2.10 done), final closing handoff to LA must include: - Stage 2 BlarAI single commit hash (from item 2.9) - Outputs of V1-V7 (concise table) - Per-work-item V8 result summary for items 2.4-2.6 - critical_notify.ps1 + escalation_notify.ps1 inspection disposition (SKIP per Appendix A.1; both confirmed at EA-4 Item 2.5) - D2-completion outcome (6 callers updated; grep zero hits; ack g5-4 SATISFIED) - D1 grep findings tabulation (12 patterns; expected mostly 0 hits post-D2-completion) - D3 closure (live._request → live.update_task) reaffirmed - D4 DIVERGE-with-clarification (chokepoint-function-as-integration; not class-routing) reaffirmed - 2.5.v2 evidence pointer (scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 + EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt) - 2.7.v2 V matrix V4-V7 NEW tests added (count + names) - 2.8 $BLARAI_PID==3 confirmation (or stop-and-report if drifted) - Confirmation: fleet still paused, Vikunja still stopped, scheduled tasks still Disabled, no new worktrees, stash@{0} byte-identical timestamp 20260424_013002 - A11 alias-vs-rename anomaly recorded in STATUS.md per g5-10 - v4 documentation correction footnote per D2 of v4 quality review (in 2.10 STATUS append) - v5 documentation correction footnote per C1-C4 of v5 verification (in 2.10 STATUS append) - Decision on watchpoint w_A4_auxiliaries (extend at Stage 2 vs deferred to Stage 6; most likely defer) - Any A12+ anomalies recorded in STATUS.md (using the format A4-A11)
